00027 // TODO remove this hard reference
00028 extern boost::shared_ptr<sprite::Module> load_list(sprite::Program &);
00029 
00030 namespace sprite
00031 {
00033   struct Program : Loader
00034   {
00035     Program();
00036   private:
00037     tr1::unordered_map<std::string, shared_ptr<Module> > m_imported;
00038   public:
00040     shared_ptr<Module const> import(std::string name);
00041 
00042     virtual ~Program() {}
00043 
00045     typedef std::vector<h_func_type> oper_t;
00046 
00048     oper_t oper;
00049 
00051     typedef std::vector<std::string> label_t;
00052 
00054     label_t ctor_label;
00055 
00057     label_t oper_label;
00058 
00060     virtual size_t insert_ctor(std::string const & name);
00061 
00063     virtual size_t insert_oper(std::string const & name, h_func_type h);
00064 
00065     template<typename Stream>
00066     friend Stream & operator<<(Stream & out, Program const & pgm)
00067     {
00068       boost::format fmt("%6d \"%s\"\n");
00069       out << "Program @ " << &pgm;
00070       
00071       out << "\n====== CONSTRUCTORS ======\n";
00072       for(size_t i=0; i<pgm.ctor_label.size(); ++i)
00073         { out << fmt % i % pgm.ctor_label.at(i); } 
00074 
00075       out << "\n====== OPERATIONS ======\n";
00076       for(size_t i=0; i<pgm.oper_label.size(); ++i)
00077         { out << fmt % i % pgm.oper_label.at(i); }
00078 
00079       return (out << std::endl);
00080     }
00081   };
00082 }
